body:
## Purpose 
Refactors test suite in preparation of API changes (addressing point about tests in #196):
* Removed unnecessary tests (e.g., smoke tests with PyCLES results that did not actually test against those results, closes #168)
* Simplified existing tests, e.g., by removing dependence on thermodynamics TestedProfiles and replacing it with test matrix
* Made tests more meaningful by adding regression tests and testing physical properties

No changes to actual source code.

Review checklist

I have:
[x] followed the codebase contribution guide: https://clima.github.io/ClimateMachine.jl/latest/Contributing/
[x] followed the style guide: https://clima.github.io/ClimateMachine.jl/latest/DevDocs/CodeStyle/
[x] followed the documentation policy: https://github.com/CliMA/policies/wiki/Documentation-Policy
[x] checked that this PR does not duplicate an open PR.

In the Content, I have included 
[x] relevant unit tests, and integration tests, 
[x] appropriate docstrings on all functions, structs, and modules, and included relevant documentation.

----
- [x] I have read and checked the items on the review checklist.
title: Refactor test suite to improve readability and physical tests
